World.title: Germany says US troop withdrawal 'foreseeable' as Trump warns of more 'cuts'

World.title: The Iran war has strengthened Ukraine in surprising ways. Could a ceasefire with Russia be closer?
World.desc: President Zelensky has been visiting the Gulf to demonstrate his country's military nous.

World.title: The clandestine network smuggling Starlink tech into Iran to beat internet blackout

World.desc: Shakira's appearance followed shows by Lady Gaga and Madonna, who have also performed on Copacabana beach in previous years.

World.title: Concern for jailed Iranian Nobel laureate as family say health deteriorating

Technology.title: Oscars says AI actors and writing cannot win awards

Technology.desc: The US military has agreed eight new contracts with big tech firms as it expands its artificial intelligence capabilities.

Technology.desc: Musk must meet a range of ambitious milestones at Tesla to justify the monster pay packet - so far he has not.

Technology.desc: The music streaming platform will review criteria such as artists' live dates and social media presence.

Technology.desc: The record results come as boss Tim Cook is preparing to bow out after 15 years at the helm.
